parameters.content: Connector template for Overleaf::sync_project_stub. Fill placeholder env vars before execution.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{"service_name":"overleaf","display_name":"Overleaf","operation_id":"sync_project_stub","method":"POST","base_url":"{$env.OVERLEAF_BASE_URL}","path":"/project/__OVERLEAF_PROJECT_ID__/sync","url":"{$env.OVERLEAF_BASE_URL}/project/__OVERLEAF_PROJECT_ID__/sync","headers":{"Authorization":"Bearer {$env.OVERLEAF_ACCESS_TOKEN}"},"body":{"project_id":"__OVERLEAF_PROJECT_ID__","artifact_ref":"__LOCAL_LATEX_ARTIFACT__"},"query":{},"integration_mode":"manual_bridge","status":"placeholder_only","credential_placeholders":["OVERLEAF_BASE_URL","OVERLEAF_ACCESS_TOKEN","OVERLEAF_PROJECT_ID"],"notes":"Project sync placeholder; keep generated LaTeX artifacts ready for manual or custom bridge upload."}}];
return [{json:{status:'placeholder_only', service:$json.service_name, operation:$json.operation_id, integration_mode:$json.integration_mode, body:$json.body, notes:$json.notes}}];
